name: Pluggable Reasoning Strategy
summary: Agent's reasoning shape (e.g. ReAct vs Function Calling) is selected via a plugin contract rather than baked in; consumers can install community-authored strategies as marketplace artefacts.

raised_by.note: Dify exposes Agent Strategy as a plugin contract.

evidence.title: Dify docs — Agent Strategy plugin
evidence.quote: An Agent Strategy Plugin helps an LLM carry out tasks like reasoning or decision-making, including choosing and calling tools, as well as handling results.

rejected_reason: Single-vendor evidence (Dify only) and the cross-framework analogue is already covered by tool-agent-registry / agent-skills (which package reasoning shapes as installable artefacts). No independent second source names a 'pluggable reasoning strategy' contract with the same intent. Reconsider if a peer framework adopts the same explicit contract and the shape differs meaningfully from existing patterns.
